projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some personal projects and systems I have built while learning software engineering and backend development.

laptopShop.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21, featuring authentication, shopping cart, order management, and an admin dashboard following the MVC architecture pattern.

bookShop.description: E-commerce bookstore system built with Spring Boot and React, supporting authentication, product management, order workflows, and online payment integration.

webJobHunter.description: A job hunting web application built with Spring Boot and React, providing features for user registration/login, personal profile creation, job search, and application management.

whatsappClone.description: Real-time messaging application inspired by WhatsApp, supporting private/group chat, JWT authentication, WebSocket communication, and chat management with Spring Boot and React.

voiceAssistant.description: Production-grade AI voice assistant platform built with microservices architecture, supporting real-time voice interaction, AI orchestration, speech processing, CI/CD automation, and observability monitoring.

techRadar.description: Developed a technology trend analytics platform that collects and analyzes Vietnamese IT market data using Knowledge Graph, Graph RAG, and Machine Learning. Built a modular Spring Boot backend with Hexagonal Architecture, integrated Neo4j, PostgreSQL, Redis, AI services, and interactive dashboards for technology trend exploration.
